Descent: Sea of Blood
['From the Manufacturer', "The distant shores of Torue Albes run red a new overlord has emerged to lay siege to the free cities of the island kingdom. However, band of heroes have rediscovered legendary ship that may be the turning point in the battles to come. Raise the sails, batten down the hatches, and set sail for the Sea of Blood!The Sea of Blood features the return of the popular Advanced Campaign mode first introduced in the Road to Legend expansion. The Advanced Campaign allows party of heroes to experience series of adventures as one continuous story, culminating in an epic battle with the overlord himself. Sailing across the lands of Torue Albes, the heroes explore exotic islands, dig up buried treasures, and engage in fierce ship-to-ship battles with the forces of the overlord! They'll man the cannons, steer the ship, and swing across on the ropes to board enemy ships, while deadly Daggertooth Sharks circle in the waters below. The heroes keep the skills and items they acquire during each adventure, allowing them to face progressively harder challenges and deadlier foes. However, the heroes won't be the only ones increasing in power the overlord will also gain strength over time, coming ever closer to achieving his own nefarious goals!Descent: Sea of Blood contains;6 storage boxes for hero, Overlord, and graveyard components1 Pad of Campaign Sheets1 Torue Albes Map Board1 double-sided Ocean Poster Map10 Power Dice220 Cards11 Ship and Map piecesOver 225 tokens, including Cannons, Lieutenants, props, map markers, training, and effects"]
['Take to the seas in this new campaign expansion', 'Customizable your ship with variety of options', 'For Ages: 12+', 'Number of Players: - 5', 'Playing Time: - hrs']

["HAMLY Conducting Double Baton Case - Complete with 2 Metal Bookmarks and Pencil \xa0 Conducting Baton Case Inside your elegant case are 3 adjustable and removable baton supports. There are also 2 soft lid pads to prevent the batons from shifting. The removable double buckle wrist strap features dual dog snaps so the case can be attached to a carry handle. \xa0 High Quality Materials This well-made black leather wand bag exterior is made from heavy duty weather-resistant 1680D nylon. The soft inside helps prevent the batons from being damaged. \xa0 Multifunctional Your lightweight baton case is great for carrying 2 batons to many different places such as; shows, performances, competitions and practices. This amazing bag can also hold a variety of other items such as; conducting batons, Harry Potter wands, security batons, martial arts sticks, self-defense sticks and moderators sticks. \xa0 Metal Bookmarks and Pencil Included in this deal are 2 durable high quality metal clip-on bookmarks. These clips are ideal for saving your page so you always k where you are at. They are ideal for use with a variety of things such as; music books, music sheets, cookbooks, manuals, textbooks and novels. Also included is a heavy duty pencil that can be kept in place with the pencil loop in your bag. \xa0 Dimensions Your conducting double baton case dimensions are 17'' / 43.18 cm x 3'' / 7.62 cm x 2'' / 5.08 cm. This high quality bag can contain two 16'' batons and has a pencil loop for your included pencil. \xa0 What's Included? - 1 x Conducting Baton Case - 2 x Metal Bookmark Clips - 1 x Pencil"]

This bag fits baton sticks to 16.5" or less.']

Airfix Tiger I 1:72 WWII Military Tank Small Starter Gift Set A55004,Unpainted
['The German Tiger I was a heavy duty armored tank tha could demolish almost everything in its path, but was one of the most expensive to produce with only 1,347 of the Tiger I being completed for all of WWII. Although one of the most aggressive weapons used by the Germans and inpenetrable by the enemy, succumbed mostly to its own mechanical failures. The Tiger I still managed to be one of the deadliest tanks throughout the war.']
['Airfix is the oldest UK manufacturer of scale model plastic kits and has been producing kits for the mass market since 1952. Airfix produce a wide range of kits aimed at all types of scale modelers with subjects such as; military aircraft, ships, cars, dioramas and military vehicles.', 'Airfix Starter Sets are ideal for beginners. Each Starter Set includes glue, brush and acrylic paints - all that is needed to complete a fabulous first kit!', 'Primary Scheme: PzKpFw Tiger I Ausf E "334" schwere Panzer-Abteilung 503, Russia July 1944. Skill level: 1. Dimensions of completed kit: length 119mm x width 53mm. Total Pieces: 39. A great plastic model kit for the beginner modeler.', 'Starter Gift Sets are perfect one-stop-shop gifts for your modeler friends, kids or to build yourself.', 'All paints, glue and brushes are included to complete the kit. Additional paints may be required to complete models to a higher specification.']

Barbie Angel of Peace Timeless Sentiments Collection 12" Figure Mattel
['Product description', '1999 - Mattel - Barbie Collectibles - Angel of Peace Barbie - Timeless Sentiments Collection - 2nd in Series - Collector Edition', 'Amazon.com', "Barbie has never looked more heavenly than she does in this collector's edition, the Angel of Peace Barbie Doll. She's dressed like an angel from a Renaissance painting, in a lovely, soft blue taffeta gown with a flowing skirt and square neckline. The gown is accented by a white chiffon insert at the front of the skirt and matching ruffles on the sleeves. A thin gold braid is tied in a bow at her waist, held by a delicate flower accent, and panels of gossamer lace float from the bow down the back of her skirt. Her wings are made of crinkled gold fabric with wired edges, so they can be positioned in a variety of ways. Angel of Peace Barbie has blue eyes to match her gown, and waist-length blonde hair, topped with a gold filigree halo. She wears blue taffeta undies to match her dress, and her feet are bare--because you don't need shoes when you have golden wings! An ivory display stand is also included.", '--Marcie Bovetz', 'From the Manufacturer', "Angel of Peace Barbie doll is a stunning vision in her ethereal ensemble. She wears a long flowing gown and pale blue moir taffetta and ivory chiffon. The waist shirred bodice has a delicate golden cord that criss cross ends in tiny golden tassles. Golden lace finishes the neckline and drapes in panels at the skirt's sides. Barbie doll has pale golden blond long hair parted in the center with two tiny braids and a simple golden circular halo. Of coarse Angel of Peace Barbie doll also features beautiful golden wings.", 'See more']
['1999 - Mattel - Barbie Collectibles - Angel of Peace Barbie - Timeless Sentiments Collection - 2nd in Series - Collector Edition']

Melissa & Doug On the Go Clay Creations Craft Kit With 6 Clay Colors and Sculpting Tool
['Product Description', "This engaging arts-and-crafts activity lets kids create dozens of clay animals in countless color combinations, then make them even more unique with accents and embellishments. Using the included molding sheet, kids can make fish, frogs, butterflies, birds, flowers, jewels, balloons, and more, then complete and decorate the scenes in the book. Clay can be stored in the resealable plastic bag to reuse again and again, or air-dried to make collectibles to keep and display. It's a perfect combination of goal-oriented play and creative expression: The illustrated step-by-step instructions show how to make each shape; colorful background scenes let kids decide how to use them!", 'From the Manufacturer', 'From classic wooden toys to crafts, pretend play, and games, Melissa & Doug products provide a launch pad to ignite imagination and a sense of wonder in all children so they can discover themselves, their passions, and their purpose. Since the company’s founding more than 25 years ago, Melissa & Doug has consistently delivered innovative products that inspire open-ended thinking, encourage kids to see new possibilities, and offer Countless Ways to Play. It’s part of a bigger vision to Take Back Childhood. Because by giving children a true childhood with the space and freedom to explore their world, we give them a path to realizing their full potential!']
['Craft kit comes with everything to create dozens of clay creations!', 'Includes 6 colors of clay (7.6 oz total), 24 mold shapes, sculpting tool, 5 scene pages, and instructions', 'Features detailed full-color illustrations, a guide to mixing colors, and helpful hints', 'Easy to learn, easy to store, and easy to create impressive results', 'On the Go format makes it perfect for families on the move!']

['With this Aladdin balloon bouquet you will receive: (1) 34" Giant Gold Number 1 Shape Foil Balloon, (1) 10" x 30" Gold "HAPPY" Air-Filled only foil balloon, (1) 9" x 26" Gold "B-DAY" inch Air-Filled only foil balloon, (1) 42" Aladdin Magic Rug Shape Foil Balloon, (2) 18" Aladdin Round Foil Balloons, (2) 19" Gold Star Foil Balloons and (1) 18" Black Jubilee Foil Balloon. Happy B-DAY Air-Filled only balloons can be strung and hung by ribbon, taped to the wall or they make amazing photo props, as shown in image. Just add Helium to the balloons and ENJOY. Inflate balloons same day of event. Latex balloons have an average indoor float time of 12-24 hours. Foil balloons can last multiple days if filled and stored properly. Balloons used outdoors will have a much less float time due to the elements. Foil balloons require a low pressure regulated foil inflator to inflate them. These regulators have an auto shut off pressure valve and will not over inflate them. Disposable Helium Tanks with a latex inflator Will Not properly inflate foils. Balloons can usually be properly filled at your local party supply store, florist and even some larger grocery chains will offer helium. For larger balloons or larger quantities of balloons, it may be more cost effective to rent a helium tank from a party rental company or local welding supplier.   HAZARD: Children under 8 years old can choke or suffocate on broken balloons or balloons that are not inflated. ADULT SUPERVISION REQUIRED. Discard broken balloons immediately. Keep the plastic bag containing these product away from small children. The thin film may cling to nose and mouth and prevent breathing. Dispose of bags immediately once product is removed!']

['Limited Edition of 6000Spike: I\'m a vampire. I know something about evil.Spikersquos vampire nature was first displayed in all its glory in the episode School Hard, but it was his handsome human face that was the more surprising side to this villain. As the seasons progressed, Spikersquos nefarious vampire ways were always the expected, but the slow reveal of his past from human poet to the sadistic, William the Bloody proved to be an even more compelling tale. As a vampire, he earned his nickname by impaling his victims on railroad spikes. Brash and on fire with blood lust, Spike was known for racing into fights just for the rush and sheer pleasure.Spike: "Becoming a vampire is a profound and powerful experience. I could feel this new strength coursing through me. Getting killed made me feel alive for the very first time"Spike admitted that it was only as a vampire that he truly learned how to live, and together with Angelus, Dru and Darla, they cut a swath of violence across Europe. A new phase of his vampire existence evolved due to his association with Buffy and being chipped by The Initiative. Unable to harm humans, Spike was forced to become something other than what his nature dictated and used his battle prowess to help the Scoobies fight the good fight, but his vampire face is always a reminder of the demon lurking within.']

Although these and other strategic failures inhibited the B1 bis tank's ability on the battlefield, it was greatly feared by German soldiers who encountered it. ["-The Pixhawk digital differential airspeed sensor has a very low offset, a high resolution and, best of all, does not suffer from the noise induced by long cables and offsets in the ratio-metric output on the APM 2.6 analog airspeed sensor. -Featuring a Measurement Specialties 4525DO sensor, with 1 psi measurement range (roughly up to 100 m/s or 360 km/h or 223 mp/h), -the Pixhawk Airspeed Sensor Kit enables a resolution of 0.84 Pa, with data delivered at 14 bits from a 24 bit delta-sigma ADC. -It also measures temperature to allow calculation of true airspeed from indicated airspeed using the MS5611 static pressure sensor on Pixhawk. -Not influenced by the heat of nearby processing components, it is much closer to the air temperature than with previous analog sensor setups. -Supported on all Pixhawk and PX4 autopilot generation boards, this kit comes with M3 / 6-32 mounting holes. -- The modified version of airspeed head adopts digital differential pressure sensor, I2C communication, suitable for , adoting PX4 original firmware -- Different from analog differential voltage sensor APM adopts, APM is not universal -Note: if you can't use the item, please change SDA->SCL,and SCL->SDA -More information: Airspeed-sensor -Package includes: -- Airspeed module x 1 -- Pitot tube x 1 -- Sillicone tube x 1 -- 4pin cable x 1"]

Avantone Pro CV-12-BLA Tube Condenser Microphone
["The CV-12 is one of the most bang-for-your-buck microphones in existence, and has been used to record countless projects. After gaining much success as a vocal mic, Avantone decided it's time to expand its coverage in the studio and on stage! Avantone is excited to announce that they have teamed up with Black Lion Audio to offer exactly that! Please welcome the CV-12BLA! With a flatter response and more headroom than before, the CV-12BLA takes what you love about the CV-12 even further! Throw it on drums or piano, close mic a guitar, or throw it on vocals for a finish so polished it'll put more expensive mics to shame!About the CV-12BLABlack Lion Audio has spent over a decade perfecting the art of modding gear. Employing this expertise, Avantone has partnered with them to develop the CV-12BLA. First and foremost, the circuit has been modified to have a flatter response. The high-mid bump that the CV12 is known for was tamed and a different capsule was used to further smooth the highs and bring out the lows resulting in more balance. This flatter response, coupled with higher headroom allows the microphone to be more of a utilitarian microphone that sounds great on just about everything. Avantone particularly found that full range sources are where the CV-12BLA really shined as the frequency range is balanced across the board. The coupling capacitor is an industry favorite Solen FastCap, which was chosen for its transparency. The 32 mm K67 capsule was replaced with a 34 mm CK12 styled capsule which was chosen to compliment the circuit. Leaving no stone unturned, the CV-12BLA features a completely redesigned power supply, featuring a low-noise circuit.Features:Uses Include: Studio vocals, acoustic guitar, mandolin, drum overheads, room mic, pianoA capsule was used to further smooth the highs and bring out the lows for more balance32 mm K67 capsule replaced with a 34 mm CK12 styled capsuleThe frequency range is more balanced across the boardThe coupling cap"]

['Elevate your LEGO building skills to a higher level with this LEGO Architecture 21046 Empire State Building set. The right pedal is the sustain pedal with half-pedaling for release-and-catch techniques. The left pedal is the Una Corda, the soft pedal for added dynamic control. When you press this pedal, all the notes you play will be slightly lower in volume and have a slightly more subdued tone quality. The middle pedal is the Sostenuto. By using this pedal, you can sustain selected notes, while other notes remain unaffected. Only the notes that are held down when the pedal is operated will sustain; other notes that you play while keeping the pedal down will sound as if no pedal was operated at all. Using the Nord Triple Pedal will add amazing depth to your Nord piano’s sounds! Since 1983, Nord has become famous for the finest electronic pianos, organs and synthesizers in the world.']

Mattel Games Balderdash Game
['Product Description', 'Balderdash rewards knowledge and creativity. Players are given a word and they each write down what they think the definition is. The definition guesses are then read aloud and voted on. A player gets points if their definition is correct but you can also earn points if people vote for your proposed definition. Includes game board, 336 game cards, answer sheet pad, 6 movers, 1 die and 1 instruction sheet. For 2 or more players.', 'From the Manufacturer', 'You can’t always believe what you read. Is it for real or is it Balderdash? Balderdash is the classic bluffing game that has gone beyond hilarious. Now with the outrageous, Laughable Laws category, play the game that challenges your friends to call your bluff. Would you believe that in Fairbanks, Alaska, it was illegal to serve beverages to a moose? You better, ’cause it’s true! Each game card lists People, Words, Initials, Movies and Laws that you’ve probably never heard of. But that’s where the fun really begins, because you get to make up an answer that’s as silly or as serious as you want! Now, mix in the real answer and vote. You score points for guessing correctly and for bluffing the other players. So, grab the bull by the horns and play Balderdash, the game that’s hilarious beyond belief.']

The straw is removed to show that the cut point has apparently moved with the straw.Dime And Penny - Every magician started with this trick but Jeff Sheridan shows you how to make it into a miracle. A coin visibly turns into another and then penetrates a solid sheet of rubber to fall into a glass.Sheridan Princess - Three pairs of cards are placed under wooden plaques. The performer removes one card from under each plaque, correctly predicting the spectator's choice in each case. A triple miracle!Card Stab - Another classic of magic given the Sheridan treatment. A selected card is shuffled into the pack, which is then wrapped in a napkin. ['Kendama is a Japanese wooden toy used since the 1700’s for increasing Hand/Eye Coordination, as well as Reflex and Balance.', '*Kendama is a traditional Japanese toy consisting of a ken (sword) and tama (ball) connected by a string. The ken has three cups and a spike which fits into the hole in the ball. Basic kendama tricks consist of catching the ball in the cups and on the spike, however a huge variety of kendama tricks can be performed by juggling the ball between the cups, balancing it in various positions on the ken, balancing the ken on the ball and juggling the kendama.', 'Kendama bears similarities to the classic cup-and-ball game, and the Hispanic world toy known as boliche or balero. The principle of these toys are the same: catching one object with another, where both are joined by a string. However the modern kendama style takes influences from a diverse range of skills including yo-yo, diabolo, juggling and dance.', '*Wikipedia']
['Kendama’s are excellent for increasing hand/eye coordination as well as reflex, agility, and balance.', 'Set of two Kendama’s is a great gift, encouraging competition and family fun.', 'Bamboo construction is eco-friendly, as well as light weight and durable. The string tether anchors the ball to handle for safety, but user discretion is advised.', 'SIZE AND WEIGHT: 5 ounces, 7 inches tall (full size).']

["Enter the mystical realm of the Wizard Dragon with Safari Ltd.'s captivating, hand-painted figure. This Wizard Dragon figure is designed with great attention to detail. Its main body is a striking blue, contrasted by darker blue scales on its back and gleaming golden scales on its underside. A row of metallic purple scales runs along its spine, and its teeth and claws are sand-colored. Holding a metallic purple crystal ball, it appears deep in contemplation. Measuring 6 inches in height and just under 5 inches in length, the Wizard Dragon is roughly the size of a piece of toast. It is part of the enchanting Dragons collection, perfect for fans of fantasy, storytelling, and magical adventures. Made with high-quality, non-toxic, BPA-free PVC, this figure is suitable for kids ages 4+ and dragon enthusiasts of all ages. Whether used as an educational tool, a creative play companion, or a unique addition to a collection, the Wizard Dragon promises endless imaginative fun. ['Steve Vai\'s signature guitars have become almost as iconic as the player himself, and now that mojo is more attainable than ever with the Ibanez JEMJR Steve Vai Signature solid body electric guitar. From the acrylic vine inlay to the instantly-recognizable "monkey grip" handle, there\'s no doubt where the JEMJR Steve Vai Signature came from. For tonal tenacity, you get two Quantum humbuckers and one Quantum single-coil pickup complete with five-way switching. Factor in the double-locking tremolo bridge, and the Ibanez JEMJR Steve Vai Signature is ready to wail. One of Ibanez\'s fastest necks to date, the Wizard III neck on the JEMJR Steve Vai Signature guitar is an absolute pleasure to play. This slim and super-comfortable neck lets you pull off lighting-fast runs and arpeggios with ease, but still gives you the substance you need for grabbing chords when you need to. From the first time you put your hands on the JEMJR\'s Wizard III neck, you\'ll know you\'ve got a guitar that was built with performance in mind. The JEMJR Steve Vai Signature packs Ibanez\'s standard double-locking bridge, which helps you maintain your tuning stability even after heavy pitch bends.']

Anthology Gear The Original Straight Up Full Grain Padded Leather Guitar Strap - For Electric, Acoustic and Bass Guitars
["Give me core components. Give me raw analog purity. Give me roots music. Give me something that skilled, dedicated human hands labored over and real sweat poured down on, whether a well-crafted tune or a custom-made guitar. Give me Wilco. Give me Keith Richards — on his acoustic. Give me Sinatra in a small room with one mic, warm acoustics, and a little cigarette smoke. Style is what you can do with less anyway. Anyone can put on a $5000 suit. But look at James Dean in jeans and a plain white t-shirt. If you want to hear straight up style, well, no one with a top-of-the-line Strat and all the effects pedals in the world has yet to surpass what some of the original blues players could transmit through a busted, homemade, out-of-tune guitar. That’s why I close my eyes to the packaging, to all the gimmicks and hollow obsessions with appearances, and just tune into sublime unprocessed sounds ringing true. Straight up — no chaser. All Anthology guitar and bass straps are hand-made with the absolute finest quality full-grain leathers in the world. Our leathers are chosen for their ability to fully distribute the weight of the guitar across the strap, for a more comfortable playing experience on those long gigs. Our straps are not only great looking, they're also super-comfortable. Between a top layer of rugged full-grain leather, and a bottom layer of ultra-soft full-grain leather, we use a high-density, premium padding, to maximize comfort without sacrificing strength. We give the guitarist the best of both worlds, a streamlined padded guitar or bass guitar strap. Comfortable and durable with style! To top it off, our full grain leather burnishes and beautifies with use. All of our guitar straps have their natural marks, scrapes and scars, which means they have loads of raw, rugged personality. They age incredibly, obtaining a beautiful vintage patina, rich with character. You will love this strap even MORE with time!"]

['With this Power Rangers 4th Birthday Balloon Bouquet you will receive: (1) 42" Power Rangers Shape Foil Balloon, (2) 17" Power Rangers Foil Balloons, (1) 17" Power Rangers Birthday Foil Balloon, (1) 34" Giant Blue Number 4 Balloon, (1) 18" Birthday Present Balloon, (2) 19" Silver Foil Stars, (5) 11" Qualatex Latex Balloons 1 each of Red, Yellow, Blue, White and Pink. All Balloons Ship Flat. Just add Helium to the balloons and ENJOY. Inflate balloons same day of event. Latex balloons have an average indoor float time of 12-24 hours. Foil balloons can last multiple days if filled and stored properly. Balloons used outdoors will have a much less float time due to the elements. Foil balloons require a low pressure regulated foil inflator to inflate them. These regulators have an auto shut off pressure valve and will not over inflate them. Disposable Helium Tanks with a latex inflator Will Not properly inflate foils. Balloons can usually be properly filled at your local party supply store, florist and even some larger grocery chains will offer helium. For larger balloons or larger quantities of balloons, it may be more cost effective to rent a helium tank from a party rental company or local welding supplier.  HAZARD – Children under 8 yrs. can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Adult supervision required. Keep uninflated balloons from children. Discard broken balloons at once. Keep the plastic bag containing these products away from small children. The thin film may cling to nose and mouth and prevent breathing. Dispose of bags immediately once product is removed.']

Martin Ranger U-6800R Metal Dual Channels UHF 900MHz Wireless Microphone System with Plug-in USB Rechargeable Lithium Battery
['U6800R is an ideal system for professional performance. It delivers truly professional performance with a outstanding stability and easy operation. This system operates in the 900MHz range which goes even further up the UHF spectrum to interference. Most common systems operate in the crowded 600MHz and 800MHz range so the UHF-6800R effectively avoids interference and frequency traffic jams with other UHF or VHF systems. The microphones themselves are designed to pick up your voice very well so you always sound like yourself and don\'t have to worry about sound degradation. ['Product Description', "In tales of the Arabian Nights, you are the hero or heroine in a story of adventure and wonder just like those told by Scheherazade to her spellbound sultan. Travel the world encountering imprisoned princesses, powerful 'efreets, evil viziers, and such marvels as the magnetic mountain and the fabled elephant's graveyard. CollectA Sea Life Narwhal Toy Figure - Authentic Hand Painted Model
["With its spiraling ''tusk,'' CollectA's beautiful Narwhal figure is a lifelike representation of this unusual toothed whale. The male Narwhal's long straight tusk is actually an elongated tooth and can grow to over 10 feet in length. Only rarely do female Narwhals grow tusks and in very rare cases, males may have two. Although Narwhals have been seen rubbing their tusks together, they do not seem to use the tusk for fighting. The Narwhal figure is detailed and realistic, a perfect addition to your child's collection. The 10.7''L x 1.6''H Narwhal is one of the beautifully sculpted figures in CollectA's Sea Life Collection. Create a natural world in miniature with high quality toy animal replicas from CollectA. CollectA is known as one of the world's leading manufacturers of the finest scaled replica collections. When they play with these replicas, children learn more about the animals and their environment, while having fun at the same time. Role play encourages the development of your child's imagination and creativity. All CollectA models are crafted to the highest standards and made with high quality, safe, phthalate-free, lead-free materials."]
